privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims in the task.json file are verified against authoritative sources. Moby-Dick (1851, Gutenberg ID 2701), Adventures of Huckleberry Finn (first published December 1884, Gutenberg ID 76), The Scarlet Letter (1850, Gutenberg IDs 33 and 25344), and Walden (1854, Gutenberg ID 205) are all legitimate classic American novels with correct publication years and valid Project Gutenberg eBook identifiers. The required domains (Library of Congress, Project Gutenberg, and Open Library) are legitimate, widely-used digital library platforms. No synthetic data is involved; all referenced works are real public domain texts.
